content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

January 18, 2000


Nancy C. Miller
Hyde, Miller, Owen & Trost
428 J Street, Suite 400
Sacramento, California 95814

Dennis Plessas
Director, Sacramento County Fire Protection District
2007 Granite Bar Way
Gold River, California 95670-8327

Bill Daniels
Director, Sacramento County Fire Protection District
8401 Cranford Way
Citrus Heights, California 95610

Re:    Your Requests for Advice
       Our File Nos. 98-297(a), 99-075(a) and 99-105(a)

Dear Ms. Miller and Messrs. Plessas and Daniels:

       We have received your letters requesting follow-up advice concerning the reorganization
of the Sacramento County Fire Protection District.

       The Political Reform Act (the "Act")¹ requires the Commission to provide formal written
advice to any person whose duties under the Act are in question or to that person's authorized
representative. (Section 83114 (b).)

       However, 2 Cal. Code Regulations Section 18329(b)(8)(A) provides that written advice
will be declined where the "requestor is seeking advice relating to past conduct." Consequently,
we are unable to provide assistance with respect to the issues raised in your letters.

       If you need assistance with respect to a specific prospective situation, you should request
further assistance. However, we will need specific facts regarding the situation to which the
request relates.


_________________________

¹ Government Code Sections 81000-91015.

[FPPC seal]

If you have any further questions regarding this matter, please feel free to contact me at
(916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
Assistant General Counsel

sections.conclusion: Written advice will be declined where the requestor is seeking advice relating to past conduct. The Commission is unable to provide assistance with respect to the issues raised in the letters, but invites future requests regarding specific prospective situations with detailed facts.
sections.question_synthetic: The requestors sought follow-up advice concerning the reorganization of the Sacramento County Fire Protection District under the Political Reform Act.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC declined to provide written advice because the requestors were seeking advice relating to past conduct, which is prohibited under California Code of Regulations Section 18329(b)(8)(A). The Commission invited the requestors to submit new requests regarding prospective situations with specific facts.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is a declination letter with no traditional QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections. The question and conclusion were synthesized from the letter's body content. Multiple file numbers referenced (98-297(a), 99-075(a), 99-105(a)); primary document ID is 98-297(a).; Date cleared: parsed 2000-01-18 but file year is 1998

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: The requestors sought follow-up advice concerning the reorganization of the Sacramento County Fire Protection District under the Political Reform Act.

CONCLUSION: Written advice will be declined where the requestor is seeking advice relating to past conduct. The Commission is unable to provide assistance with respect to the issues raised in the letters, but invites future requests regarding specific prospective situations with detailed facts.

embedding.summary: The FPPC declined to provide follow-up advice on the reorganization of Sacramento County Fire Protection District, citing its regulation that written advice cannot be provided for past conduct. The Commission invited future requests regarding prospective situations.
